commit_message: AVMA should assert if writing CC AVMA should assert if writing CC On a full interrupt return, if AVMA is being used to inhibit DOut access, then this signal is being lowered prematurely during the stack write for the CC register. This causes a zero write (if that is what is being driven if bus is inhibited) for CC, causing the subsequent pull to fail to recover registers (since the E bit would return as 0), thus causing PC to not return from whence it came. I am not sure which way the silicon ac
